name: Human

active.name: Second Wind
active.description: Once per short rest, restore HP based on your level.

world: Trusted by other humans; better prices at human-run shops.
flavor: More versatile than they are remembered for.

name: Elf

passive.name: Keen Senses
passive.description: Cannot be surprised. Sense hidden doors and seams that others miss.

active.name: Moonbeam
active.description: Ranged magic attack that deals radiant damage.

world: Can read ancient Elvish inscriptions, unlocking lore quests.

name: Dwarf

passive.name: Stonecunning
passive.description: Advantage on checks in caves/dungeons; poison resistance 50%.

active.name: Dwarven Fortitude
active.description: Reduce incoming damage by 5 for one turn.

world: Dwarven merchants offer fair prices; can name the worth of any stone on sight.
flavor: Carved out of mountains they refuse to leave.

name: Halfling

passive.name: Lucky
passive.description: Once per combat, retry a failed action.

active.name: Dash
active.description: Move 2x this turn; cannot be opportunity-attacked.

world: Small enough to slip through gaps that close behind others.
flavor: Small. Easily underestimated. Rarely killed twice.

name: Orc

passive.name: Savage Attacks
passive.description: Increased critical hit chance on attacks.

active.name: Relentless Endurance
active.description: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead. Once per long rest.

world: Your presence cows the cautious; some doors close before you reach them.
flavor: Feared on sight, even where they have done no wrong.

name: Tiefling

active.name: Hellish Rebuke
active.description: When struck in melee, reflect fire damage back at the attacker.

world: The honest distrust you. The other sort take you in.
flavor: Born of pacts not their own. The world knows what they are.

name: Dragonborn

passive.name: Draconic Ancestry
passive.description: Pick an element at creation; resist that element 50%.

active.name: Breath Weapon
active.description: Cone attack that deals elemental damage. Cooldown after each use.

world: The dragon-blooded honor you. The slayers of dragons remember you, too.
flavor: They carry the blood of dragons. The world has not forgotten what that means.

name: Gnome

passive.name: Gnome Cunning
passive.description: Advantage on saves vs magic effects.

active.name: Minor Illusion
active.description: Create a decoy that distracts enemies for 2 turns.

world: Old mechanisms answer your hands — traps and clockwork that defeat others.
flavor: Tinkers and theorists. Their inventions outlive them.

name: Half-Elf

passive.name: Skill Versatility
passive.description: Gain proficiency in any two skills.

active.name: Fey Charm
active.description: Attempt to charm a humanoid for 1 minute (Wisdom save to resist).

world: Welcomed in elf-halls and human towns alike. Belonging follows you nowhere.
flavor: Walks between worlds. At home in none.

playerChoiceBonuses.description: Choose 2 different stats other than CHA to gain +1 each

name: Tabaxi

passive.name: Feline Agility
passive.description: Double movement on the first turn of combat.

active.name: Claws
active.description: Natural weapon that deals slashing damage scaling with DEX. Always available.

world: Walls hold no secrets from your claws. Beasts speak more freely to you.
flavor: Wanderers from beyond the maps. They came once, and stayed.
